description: API hygiene scanner for small teams and their coding agents — test REST API endpoints against the OpenAPI spec, catch contract drift, track coverage
rules: Run `zond init` once per project, then `zond add api <name> --spec <openapi>` to register an API
The first audit pass is read-only: `zond audit --api <name> --safe` — mutating probes need an explicit --live opt-in on a sandbox
zond is deterministic and never calls an LLM — it emits raw evidence and closed-enum recommended_action hints; severity and triage judgment belong to the agent
.api-fixtures.yaml is the read-only manifest of required vars; .env.yaml holds only their values — never sync the list into .env.yaml
